14.reason: [Variable 'i' is used after loop ends; its value is equal to the last value from loop condition, which is (sta[m+2]-sta[m]-1), but this relies on undefined behavior if loop never runs]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [After loop, 'i' equals (sta[m+2]-sta[m]-1), so 'n=n+i' skips correct number of positions, but logic assumes m+2 exists without checking bounds]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Variable 'i' is used after loop ends; its value is equal to the last value from loop condition, which is (sta[m+2]-sta[m]-1), but this relies on undefined behavior if loop never runs]
